title: ICT Infrastructure Engineer (Windows)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Windows ICT Infrastructure Engineer to join our team and take ownership of Windows-based infrastructure systems and projects. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and managing Windows server environments, with particular expertise in Microsoft Active Directory and related technologies. This role requires a strategic thinker who can translate business requirements into robust Windows infrastructure solutions whilst ensuring compliance with government technical standards and policies. The position involves close collaboration with service providers, application teams, and operations staff to deliver high-availability Windows infrastructure that supports critical business applications. The ideal candidate will serve as the primary Windows infrastructure specialist, providing technical leadership from project inception through to operational handover.

Work Location : MAS (On Contract)

Key Responsibilities

a. Implement Windows-based infrastructure projects within their established practice to ensure service delivery and support to meet the intended availability, continuity and capacity requirements.
b. Translate business requirements into Windows infrastructure design solutions.
c.Work with service providers to design, develop, deploy and configure Windows infrastructure to meet resiliency, availability and data integrity needs.
d. Ensure compliance to Authority's Technical Architecture and SG-TRM, as well as IM8 and Authority IT Policies for Windows environments.
e.Manage Windows Infrastructure operations, projects and services to support application systems environments.
f. Request to provision new Windows VMs for new systems deployment.
g. Manage Windows system architecture, resource planning, infrastructure performance and system hosting environment from server hardware to Windows OS layer (excluding hypervisor and storage) in support of new applications.
h. Serve as main Windows infrastructure single-point-of-contact for all new application system initiatives and to support/assist in application architecture design, integration and acceptance and Windows infrastructure performance testing.
i. Handover Windows Infrastructure and Systems standard operating procedures and day-to-day performance/availability monitoring to Operations Engineer upon commissioning and completion of PGP.
j. Support Operations Engineer on Windows Infrastructure and Systems troubleshooting and maintenance.
k. Assist in Windows Infrastructure Architecture review, support and endorsement. Review Windows hardening standards for OS, database and applications.
l. Windows hosting environment infrastructure on-boarding (design, setup, configuration, implementation, testing and commissioning of Windows infrastructure components).
m. Understand Windows systems operations environment including monitoring, patching, and maintenance procedures.
n. Take care of end-to-end Windows operations and integrations with client machines.
o. Expert proficiency with Microsoft Active Directory and Windows ecosystem, including:
· Active Directory Backup/Restore procedures
· Group Policy Object (GPO) creation, maintenance and troubleshooting
· Active Directory Migration/Upgrade planning and execution
·Windows Authentication/Authorization mechanisms
· Active Directory Site and Services connectivity design
· Government Commercial Cloud (GCC) Active Directory (EC2 instance) management
· GCC RDS Active Directory integration and management
· Windows Server roles and features (DNS, DHCP, Certificate Services, etc.)
· Windows clustering and high availability solutions
·  Windows PowerShell scripting and automation
• Windows security hardening and compliance frameworks

Skills and Qualifications:

a. Tertiary Education in Computer Science, Information Technology, or relevant technical fields is preferred.
b. Minimum 3-5 years hands-on experience in Windows Server environments (2016/2019/2022), including Windows OS virtualization technologies, Windows-based SAN storage integration, and Microsoft SQL Server databases.
c. Strong expertise in Microsoft technologies including Windows Server, Active Directory, Exchange, SharePoint, and System Center suite.
d. Proficiency in Windows PowerShell scripting, automation tools, and Windows deployment technologies (WDS, MDT, SCCM).
e. Experience with Windows security frameworks, patch management, and compliance tools.
f. Ability to take a broad, strategic perspective on Windows infrastructure whilst drilling deep to understand business needs and technical challenges.
g. Ability to analyse and identify comprehensive Windows-based solutions considering all functional implications while developing workable solutions.
h. Results and customer oriented with focus on Windows service delivery excellence.
i. Team player with strong organisation and people handling skills in Windows project environments.
j. Excellent communication skills, both oral and written, with the ability to present Windows technical solutions and influence stakeholders.
k. Relevant Microsoft certifications (MCSA, MCSE, Azure certifications) would be advantageous. Experience with Windows monitoring tools (Performance Monitor) and Windows troubleshooting methodologies.

postedCompany.description:
INNOVATIQ TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD:

We are Singapore Head Quartered multinational company with offices in Singapore, Malaysia and India. Planning to expand to other South East Asia and US. We are Client business focused technology and consultancy services company which focuses mainly in on the below business towers:

1. Digital Transformation

2. Cloud enablement & migration

3. Cyber Security

4. Consultancy Services

1. Digital Transformation:

We provide end to end Digital Transformation through application development, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Internet of things to customers who want to keep pace with changing trends to achieve competitive edge of new generation business models. Even in this fast-moving 5G internet world we found some of the companies are stuck with their old practices of using excel and legacy applications to run their business. These legacy applications are still useful but require huge costs to enhance and maintain due to lack of support from the vendors. For such companies, we offer our consultancy services to implement and migrate to a new out-of-the-box products that provides more powerful features and support their business with productive way of working and reducing their operational cost.

Digital transformation is the integration of digital technology into all areas of a business, fundamentally changing how you operate and deliver value to customers. It's also a cultural change that requires organizations to continually challenge the status quo, experiment, and get comfortable with failure. We provide Digital Transformation to Mid-Market and Enterprise Customers vis App Dev, AI, ML, RPA and IoT.

ERP Rollout for midmarket & Enterprise clients:

ERP provides complete visibility into core business processes and optimizes systems through superior resource tracking and reporting, database management and data sharing and overall improved information systems. ERP systems can allow your business to expand without the addition of IT or staffing costs. We implement & support SAP S4 HANA, MS Dynamics.

2. Cloud Enablement & Migration

Our cloud service offerings include end to end consultancy and implementation as per needs of our customer business requirement. We are partner agnostic company and work with multiple cloud players of the market. Our employees are cloud certified with AWS, Azure and IBM. We offer our consultancy services to those clients who are looking to bring down their capex and move their workloads to open platforms that can help them to operate with minimal cost and faster response.

We support the most open and secure public cloud for businesses and suggest a next-generation hybrid multi cloud platforms, advanced data and AI capabilities, and deep enterprise expertise across various Industries.
postedCompany.name: INNOVATIQ TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.
